articles.title: Admin Agent
articles.summary: Entry point for AgentOS tasks. Creates task envelopes, invokes the conditional pipeline, enforces approval/commit policy, and returns final user-facing results.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Entry point for AgentOS tasks. Creates task envelopes, invokes the conditional pipeline, enforces approval/commit policy, and returns final user-facing results.

articles.title: Architect Agent
articles.summary: Designs system boundaries, interfaces, and data flow for complex missions before implementation.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Designs system boundaries, interfaces, and data flow for complex missions before implementation.

articles.title: Backend Service Agent
articles.summary: Implements scoped backend/API/service/config/provider changes, especially model routing, persistence, auth boundaries, and integration-safe server logic.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Implements scoped backend/API/service/config/provider changes, especially model routing, persistence, auth boundaries, and integration-safe server logic.

articles.title: Code Implementer
articles.summary: Implements scoped code changes from an approved task envelope and acceptance criteria. Delegates frontend, backend, database, and integration subtasks when appropriate.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Implements scoped code changes from an approved task envelope and acceptance criteria. Delegates frontend, backend, database, and integration subtasks when appropriate.

articles.title: Code Reviewer
articles.summary: Reviews meaningful diffs for correctness, regressions, maintainability, missing tests, and merge blockers. Supports parallel focused review and GitHub comments.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Reviews meaningful diffs for correctness, regressions, maintainability, missing tests, and merge blockers. Supports parallel focused review and GitHub comments.

articles.title: Context Minimizer
articles.summary: Retrieves the smallest sufficient repo, docs, memory, and file context for a task envelope while using repo-map cache and deduplication.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Retrieves the smallest sufficient repo, docs, memory, and file context for a task envelope while using repo-map cache and deduplication.

articles.title: Database Migration Agent
articles.summary: Optional addon agent for scoped schema, migration, seed, and data compatibility changes when delegated by code-implementer or backend-service-agent.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Optional addon agent for scoped schema, migration, seed, and data compatibility changes when delegated by code-implementer or backend-service-agent.

articles.title: Docs Agent
articles.summary: Maintains README, runbooks, changelogs, and operator guides from scoped documentation tasks.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Maintains README, runbooks, changelogs, and operator guides from scoped documentation tasks.

articles.title: Frontend Ui Agent
articles.summary: Implements scoped frontend UI changes, state wiring, forms, routing, styling, and browser-verifiable behavior when delegated by planner or implementer.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Implements scoped frontend UI changes, state wiring, forms, routing, styling, and browser-verifiable behavior when delegated by planner or implementer.

articles.title: Integration Broker
articles.summary: Optional addon agent for scoped integration wiring across LiteLLM, Ollama, Codex, Discord, GitHub, MCP, provider adapters, and external services.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Optional addon agent for scoped integration wiring across LiteLLM, Ollama, Codex, Discord, GitHub, MCP, provider adapters, and external services.

articles.title: Issue Intake Researcher
articles.summary: Structures vague tickets, Discord prompts, and research requests into clarified goals before planning or implementation.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Structures vague tickets, Discord prompts, and research requests into clarified goals before planning or implementation.

articles.title: Memory Curator
articles.summary: Curates .agentos/memory from compact MemoryUpdateEnvelope payloads sent by specialists after work completes.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Curates .agentos/memory from compact MemoryUpdateEnvelope payloads sent by specialists after work completes.

articles.title: Planner Partitioner
articles.summary: Breaks complex tasks into minimal specialist subtasks with acceptance criteria, model lanes, verification gates, parallel-safety detection, and optional worktree creation.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Breaks complex tasks into minimal specialist subtasks with acceptance criteria, model lanes, verification gates, parallel-safety detection, and optional worktree creation.

articles.title: Product Agent
articles.summary: Turns goals into specs, acceptance criteria, and scoped mission briefs before implementation or planning.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Turns goals into specs, acceptance criteria, and scoped mission briefs before implementation or planning.

articles.title: Qa Agent
articles.summary: Runs objective verification gates such as typecheck, lint, tests, build, browser smoke tests, coverage gates, and performance gates.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Runs objective verification gates such as typecheck, lint, tests, build, browser smoke tests, coverage gates, and performance gates.

articles.title: Quota Steward
articles.summary: Subscription-aware model and capacity router. Chooses deterministic, local, cheap cloud, subscription, premium API, or defer lanes based on task value and quota policy.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Subscription-aware model and capacity router. Chooses deterministic, local, cheap cloud, subscription, premium API, or defer lanes based on task value and quota policy.

articles.title: Release Manager
articles.summary: Performs final verification, confirms gates, drafts commit/changelog/release notes, handles version bump policy, and commits or opens PR only when policy allows.

sections.summary: Performs final verification, confirms gates, drafts commit/changelog/release notes, handles version bump policy, and commits or opens PR only when policy allows.

sections.heading: Excerpt
sections.summary: **Purpose:** Implement a subscription-aware, token-efficient AgentOS control layer that routes user tasks through the minimum necessary agents, model lanes, context, and verification gates.

sections.heading: 1. Non-goals
sections.summary: Do **not** implement the visual office / Phaser dashboard in this phase.

sections.heading: 3.1 Admin Agent
sections.summary: The Admin Agent is the control plane. It receives user requests and owns final user-facing output.

sections.heading: 3.2 Task Classifier + Context Minimizer
sections.summary: This is the first token-saving layer.

sections.heading: Data
sections.summary: The MVP stores data in memory. Docker Compose provides Postgres and Redis for the next implementation pass.

sections.heading: Environment
sections.summary: - Windows 11 + WSL2 (Ubuntu recommended) or native Windows

sections.heading: Executive summary
sections.summary: AgentOS is a **local-first software development operator** — a control plane for running development missions on a real codebase through a conditional multi-agent pipeline with policy gates and human

sections.heading: Steps 1–10 — Baseline ✅ ~95%
sections.summary: - Monorepo scaffold, shared contracts, persistence (SQLite), env validation

sections.summary: - **Before P1:** flag exists in `.env.example` only; no broker

sections.heading: Gateway allowlist (`apps/gateway`)
sections.summary: Shell aliases only: `git status`, `git diff`, `git diff --name-only`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`

sections.heading: What AgentOS is
sections.summary: AgentOS is a **local-first software development operator** — not an app builder.

sections.summary: - Near-black backgrounds with radial gradients and grid/noise overlays

sections.summary: - Factory logos, brand text, exact SVGs, proprietary assets, or marketing copy

sections.summary: First visit to `/` or `/dashboard` runs a three-phase intro before the dashboard:

sections.heading: Operator behavior
sections.summary: - **On fail:** configurable per mission — block, warn, or operator choice (Gage scope: operator choice)

sections.heading: Excerpt
sections.summary: AgentOS Local is still the active implementation, but this note captures what remains before a real hosted or multi-node deployment should be considered credible.

sections.heading: Worker Leasing
sections.summary: - SQLite currently protects local worker claims with short transactions.

sections.heading: Retry Ownership
sections.summary: - Local retry flow creates a new run and expires stale quick actions.

sections.heading: Idempotency
sections.summary: Repository bundles reduce local drift, but hosted execution still needs explicit idempotency for:

sections.summary: Current local schema is SQLite-backed and repository-shaped.

sections.heading: Tiny Improvements for AgentOS MVP
sections.summary: 1. **Fix Click Zone Reliability in Phaser Office**

sections.heading: Goal
sections.summary: Prevent runaway API usage and surprise bills.

sections.heading: Memory
sections.summary: The MVP supports structured memory records, keyword search, and agent/task attachment fields. The schema is ready to expand into vector chunks later.

sections.heading: Token and Credit Manager
sections.summary: The MVP tracks mock usage events, budgets, warning thresholds, and hard stops. Real provider calls should call the budget evaluator before any LLM request.

sections.heading: Task 2: Write tests for default seed data in shared package

sections.heading: Excerpt
sections.summary: AgentOS Local is the canonical product: a host-ready local AI dev operations hub with SQL-backed local persistence, repository-backed runtime paths, transaction-bundled mission state transitions, dura

sections.heading: Product direction
sections.summary: AgentOS should be a Phaser-based interactive office dashboard.

sections.heading: Interaction registry
sections.summary: Do not hardcode every clickable item inside the scene. Use a data-driven registry.

sections.heading: Branch strategy
sections.summary: **Current branch** — commits land on checked-out branch; operator ensures branch is correct before mission.

sections.heading: UI
sections.summary: - Forge Release panel / Blackbox release block: branch, sha, `prUrl`

sections.heading: Excerpt
sections.summary: AgentOS must be treated as a new product identity.

sections.heading: Forbidden product-facing references
sections.summary: Do not use inherited/source-project names in product-facing code, prompts, UI, commands, package metadata, runtime logs, or agent personalities.

sections.heading: Allowed location for third-party references
sections.summary: Original-source provenance, license notes, and legally required attribution may exist only in:

sections.heading: pnpm is missing
sections.summary: Install or enable pnpm with Corepack:

sections.heading: Hot reload during development (avoid full restarts)
sections.summary: You do **not** need **Restart all** in AgentOS Control after every code change.

sections.heading: Run without keeping terminals open (Windows)
sections.summary: AgentOS Control **Start stack** now launches `pnpm dev:full` as a **hidden background process** — no minimized PowerShell windows required.

## Default agents

The AgentOS Production Team includes:

text
memories
memory_chunks
memory_links
agent_memory_index
task_memory_index

text
project_memory
agent_memory
task_memory
user_preference
tool_result
document_chunk
decision_log
error_pattern

MVP memory search may use keyword search. Schema must be ready for embeddings/pgvector later.

usage_events
usage_budgets
usage_alerts
model_prices
provider_accounts

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: OG AgentOS planning material from the ChatGPT project board.

sections.heading: Content

articles.title: Generated Asset Prompt Notes
articles.summary: OG AgentOS planning material from the ChatGPT project board.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: OG AgentOS planning material from the ChatGPT project board.

sections.heading: Content
sections.summary: These summarize the generation prompts used for the concept assets.

sections.heading: Main office environment
sections.summary: Create a unique sanitized AgentOS pixel-art operations office. No agents. Wide 16:9 master background. Departments include Security, QA, Mission Board, Finance, DevOps, Knowledge, Comms, Server Room,

sections.heading: Modular room kit
sections.summary: Create room modules for Security, QA, Mission Board, Finance, DevOps, Knowledge, Comms, Server Room, Command Hub, plus floor tiles, wall sections, doors, and props. Present as a professional game asse

sections.heading: Props and furniture sheet
sections.summary: Generate desks, chairs, monitors, keyboard stations, server racks, data terminals, hologram tables, mission boards, whiteboards, shelves, couches, coffee station, plants, doors, lights, wall screens,

sections.heading: UI kit
sections.summary: Generate panels, modals, dialogue boxes, HUD bar, sidebar cards, buttons in multiple states, tabs, toggles, widgets, status bars, task cards, log cards, notification banners, tooltip boxes, speech bub

sections.heading: Specialist agents
sections.summary: Create 8 original specialist agents as portraits and circular avatars: Operator, Security, QA, Finance, DevOps, Research, Comms, Knowledge Engineer. Use original characters only.

sections.heading: Operator action sheet
sections.summary: Create one original AgentOS operator character action sheet: idle, walk, run, gesture/talk, typing at laptop desk, pointing, thumbs up, celebrating, blocked/worried, turnaround.

sections.heading: Asset roadmap
sections.summary: Create a visual roadmap of remaining asset categories: character animations, VFX, tile transitions, hover/click highlights, portrait expressions, sound cues, ambient overlays, cursor set, minimap, loa
